zh.lifeSummary: 當Laure de Montfort於1205年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利時，她的父親Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV30歲，母親Alix de Montmorency31歲。她於大約1225年與Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1236年在法國皮卡迪索姆皮易尼享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Laure de Montfort于1205年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利时，她的父亲Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV30岁，母亲Alix de Montmorency31岁。她于大约1225年与Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1236年在法国皮卡迪索姆皮易尼享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Laure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Laure de Montfort was born in 1205, in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, her father, Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV, was 30 and her mother, Alix de Montmorency, was 31. She married Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens about 1225. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died in 1236, in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Laure de Montfort est née en 1205, à Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, son père, Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alix de Montmorency, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens environ 1225. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1236, à Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Laure de Montfort 1205 in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV 30 und ihre Mutter Alix de Montmorency 31. Sie hat um 1225 Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1236 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Laure de Montfort è nata il nel 1205 nel Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Alix de Montmorency, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens circa 1225. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1236, nel Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Laure de Montfortが1205年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスモントフォート-ル'アマアウリーで生まれた時，父Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IVは30歳，母Alix de Montmorencyは31歳であった。約1225年にGérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiensと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1236年にフランスピカーディソンメピククイグニーで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Laure de Montfort(이)가 1205년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 몽포트-'아모리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix de Montmorency(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1225년 Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1236년 프랑스 피카디 솜 피c키그니에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Laure de Montfort nasceu em 1205, em Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Montmorency, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens aproximadamente 1225. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1236, em Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, França, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Laure de Montfort родилась в 1205 г. в местности монтфорт-л'амаури, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix de Montmorency, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens около 1225 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1236 г. в местности пиккуигни, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Laure de Montfort nació en 1205, en Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Alix de Montmorency, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens aproximadamente 1225. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1236, en Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 31 años.
